title: defparam or #() syntax do not modify the actual parameter

features.name: defparam parameter override on module instance
features.description: Code should include defparam statements that override parameters of an instantiated module, where the child module has ports sized by those parameters

features.name: parameterized port sizing with defparam override
features.description: Code should include a module with input/output ports sized by parameters, instantiated with defparam overriding those sizing parameters

features.name: module library loading with read_verilog -lib flag
features.description: Code should include a library module loaded with the -lib flag that gets instantiated with parameter overrides
